name: Neustar Identity Resolution and Analytics API
what_it_does: Identity resolution and marketing analytics platform with REST API — providing deterministic identity resolution, consumer data enrichment, marketing measurement, fraud risk scoring, and customer intelligence, now part of TransUnion, connecting online and offline consumer identities for marketing and risk management use cases.
use_cases: Resolving customer identities across devices and channels for unified customer profiles
Enriching customer records with demographic and firmographic data via Neustar API
Measuring cross-channel marketing attribution using Neustar's identity graph
Screening transactions and phone numbers for fraud risk using Neustar risk scores
Building and activating addressable audiences using Neustar's identity infrastructure
not_for: Simple email marketing (use Mailchimp for email campaigns without identity complexity)
Small businesses — Neustar/TransUnion serves enterprise with large customer databases
Real-time bidding infrastructure (Neustar provides identity, not programmatic infrastructure)
best_when: An enterprise marketer or financial institution needs deterministic identity resolution backed by TransUnion's credit bureau data — especially for high-accuracy consumer identity matching, fraud detection, and cross-channel attribution.
avoid_when: You're a small company, don't have compliance resources for credit bureau data, primarily need probabilistic rather than deterministic identity, or are outside the US market.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials flow. API key for legacy endpoints. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped with use-case-level access controls. No webhooks — synchronous API for real-time identity resolution. Batch processing via file transfer for large-scale enrichment. FCRA compliance controls for credit data use cases. Scoped by data product (identity, risk, marketing).

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-query pricing or volume licensing; contact TransUnion/Neustar sales
pricing.notes: Sterling, VA company. Founded 1996. Acquired by TransUnion 2021 for $3.1B. Now TransUnion's Marketing Solutions division. NYSE listed as TransUnion (TRU). $3.8B+ revenue (TransUnion 2023). Neustar brings identity resolution and marketing analytics to complement TransUnion's credit bureau data. OnePlatform for unified identity across marketing and risk. 8,000+ enterprise customers. FCRA compliance for credit data use cases.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise rate limits per account and use case

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for identity resolution, data enrichment, and risk scoring. OAuth2 auth. Good enterprise documentation. FCRA compliance restrictions on credit data use — permissible purpose required for consumer credit data. Batch processing for large-scale enrichment via SFTP. No webhooks — synchronous API calls. TransUnion integration adds data product complexity.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Identity queries fully idempotent (same input → same output). Risk score queries idempotent. Data enrichment reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: FCRA permissible purpose required for consumer credit data — cannot use for marketing without consent
CCPA and GDPR opt-out lists must be applied before API queries — Neustar processes opt-outs
TransUnion acquisition (2021) — some products migrating to TransUnion branding and APIs
Credit bureau data use for marketing is legally restricted — consult legal before implementation
US-only data strength — international identity resolution is limited vs US market

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, CCPA, FCRA, HIPAA compliant. US data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. NYSE-listed TransUnion subsidiary with credit bureau security standards. Consumer identity data is highly sensitive — implement strict data governance. FCRA compliance for credit data access requires documented permissible purpose. Consumer opt-out processing mandatory per CCPA and FCRA. Audit logging of all identity queries for regulatory compliance.
